name: Venison Jerky2
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 1/2 teaspoon salt, 1/3 teaspoon garlic powder, 1/2 teaspoon black pepper, 1 teaspoon Accent, 1 teaspoon onion powder, and 1/4 cup each Worcestershire sauce and soy sauce to make a marinade.
2. Marinate 1-1/2 lbs of deer meat (or beef like Flank Steak) in the mixture for at least 8 hours.
3. Slice the marinated meat into 1/8 inch strips following the grain, to desired lengths.
4. Spread the slices on an oven rack lined with foil, ensuring they don't overlap.
5. Bake in an oven set to the lowest temperature with the door slightly open for 6-8 hours until dry.
6. Store in a container; it can be eaten immediately or later as it becomes drier when cold.
